A Taste of What's Inside

Built for a Full Day, Not a Single Occasion.

  • 01
    Golf SimulatorsFour private bays, tournament-grade tracking, a bar cart that knows what you drink.
  • 02
    The CaféOpen early, open late. Espresso before calls, something stronger after.
  • 03
    Lounges & Work RoomsQuiet enough to focus, social enough to be interrupted on purpose.
  • 04
    Chef PartnershipsRotating tastings and seasonal menus from Seattle’s best kitchens.
  • 05
    Rooftop EnclaveFire pit, string lights, the kind of view that ends most arguments.

Beyond the Amenities

Member Dinners, Tastings, Golf Nights, and the Kind of Programming You Actually Show Up For.

The Rooms

A Walk Through the Club.

01 The Café Espresso before calls, something slower after.
02 The Simulator Bay Tournament-grade tracking, real-time feedback, and a proper reason to leave work early.
03 The Rooftop Fire pit lit, string lights on. The night usually wins.
04 Founder Dinners Long tables, good wine, conversations that outlast the meal.
05 Fitness, Branded Even the kettlebells know whose club this is.
06 Upstairs Lounge Kickoff, snacks, and three generations arguing about the referee.
07 Recovery Suite Rest. Recover. Perform. Exactly what the wall says.
